title: Slime's Gallery: Scrapped Catalogue
description: This was an addon to Slime's Gallery which added removed/scrapped content.
body:
![scrapped_logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d92a63715d0cd17e38b9a956fc5f729ed131fbbb_0.webp)

**This mod has been discontinued as we've changed our plans on how scrapped paintings are handled! For now you can check out the regular mod.**

This was an addon to [Slime's Gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/slimes-gallery) added 8 additional scrapped paintings that were initially planned or removed from the main mod. 

**Anyways consider joining My discord :)**

[https://discord.com/invite/5zMFcStp7d](https://discord.com/invite/5zMFcStp7d)

**Have a preview of all scrapped paintings that were picked to be in this mod.**

![scrapped_lol](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97ebd12d1b823c3dd33efc253724a2ebff85e4e2.png)
